AGENTS.md:757:## Note on Built-in TODO Functionality
AGENTS.md:759:Also, if I ask you to explicitly use your built-in TODO functionality, don't complain about this and say you need to use beads. You can use built-in TODOs if I tell you specifically to do so. Always comply with such orders.
